title: a^n Recursive
description: Calculates a to the power of n using recursive approach which runs in O(log n) time by squaring.

title: Disjoint Set Union (DSU)
description: DSU (Disjoint Set Union), also known as Union-Find, is a data structure designed to track a set of elements partitioned into multiple non-overlapping subsets.

title: Monotonic Stacks
description: Implementation of Next Greater Element, Previous Greater Element, Next Smaller Element, and Previous Smaller Element using Monotonic Stacks.

title: NGE PGE in One Loop
description: Finds the Next Greater Element (NGE) and Previous Greater Element (PGE) for all array elements in a single pass using a monotonic stack.

title: Add Two Numbers
description: Adds two numbers represented as linked lists where each node stores one digit and the list head is the least significant digit.

title: LC 930-Binary Subarrays With Sum
description: Counts the number of subarrays whose sum equals a target using prefix sums and a frequency map for efficient O(n) processing.

title: 1915. Number of Wonderful Substrings
description: Counts wonderful substrings by using prefix parity masks to detect substrings with at most one odd-frequency character.

title: LC 525 - Contiguous Array
description: Finds the longest subarray with an equal number of 0s and 1s using a prefix-sum and hashmap approach.
